title: DFU - Case Update Needed popup present if Charge Case is on outdated FW
scenario: "Case Update Needed" card on Home Screen is dismissible and does not reappear after app restart when earbuds firmware is updated but case firmware is outdated
steps: 1. Ensure earbuds and charge case are on outdated firmware.
2. Open Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to Home screen.
3. Update the earbuds firmware via the app.
4. Observe the Home screen after the update completes.
5. Tap the "Case Update Needed" card to dismiss it.
6. Close and restart the Poly Studio Mobile app.
7. Observe the Home screen after restarting the app.
expected: After tapping the "Case Update Needed" card, it is dismissed. After restarting the app, the card does not reappear on the Home screen.
